title: Emmanuel Grégoire's long run to Paris City Hall
subhead: The next mayor of Paris, who will be officially elected by the city council on Sunday, will now step into the spotlight after years in the shadow of his political mentors.

In Italy, Giorgia Meloni's failed referendum opens a new chapter in her term
subhead: The judicial reform project submitted to voters by the Italian prime minister was rejected by 53.7% of the vote, after a tense campaign and amid high voter turnout.

title: Mette Frederiksen heads into Danish elections as a global figure, but a divisive one domestically
subhead: In power since 2018, the leader of the Social Democrats is seeking re-election on Tuesday. While her support for Ukraine and her firm stance against Donald Trump regarding Greenland have earned her recognition on the European stage, her party has been struggling in the polls.

title: Nicolas Di Felice leaves Courrèges
subhead: The house, owned by the Artemis holding company, announced the departure of its artistic director on Tuesday. After five years at the helm, the Belgian designer created a sophisticated, wearable wardrobe infused with references to André Courrèges.

subhead: Craving a quinoa arancini, an Asian-inspired salad or a coconut dessert? Here is our selection of places in Paris and the suburbs where you can enjoy quality vegetarian food for under €20.

title: France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through Strava data
